name: Spaghetti with Tomatoes & Arugula
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the pasta until almost al dente; add the arugula and cook for a few moments.
2. Drain the pasta.
3. In a separate pan, lightly sauté the shallots or garlic in olive oil.
4. Add the tomatoes to the pan and cook over high heat until the sauce thickens.
5. Season with salt and red pepper flakes or cayenne.
6. Toss the cooked pasta and arugula with the tomato sauce.
7. Serve immediately.
VARIATIONS:
- Add the arugula to the tomato sauce instead of the pasta.
- Use whole wheat pasta instead of spaghetti.
- Substitute broccoli tops for the arugula, which may require more red pepper flakes.
- Finish with a sprinkling of fresh herbs such as basil or oregano.
